DLPCDLC-Python; Standalone Python Package includes

1. Python
   # auto-generated standalone Python command handler script from the CDEF file

2. command_handler
   # DLPC7540 unified command handler library (see readme.txt for more details)

3. USBConnection.py
   # Sample of the USB Connection that works with the command_handler.phy.usbhid and DLPC754x's Command Protocol

4. 754x_TestScript_Template.py
   # Sample script for read & write commands
